It glitches, the hands and the environment. reviews.review_title: good game but could be improved alot
reviews.review_description: the graphics are nice, it sorta reminded me of borderlands. however, the npc voicelines annoy me alot. they keep making cringe robot-themed jokes whilst im trying to make food. and also the game mechanics felt a bit weird. the constant questionares made me stop playing. but i would play it again and would play it more if i noticed some inprovements.

Great game concept , timers is a bit fast and there has been a couple of bugs that when you grab something with the right controller the item gets stuck in your hand it won't let go , sometimes the hands will jist disappear with the item instead , had to restart a couple of times still no fix

The time is going WAYYY to fast. at least make it 2-3 minutes. Game play is good tho, i didn't get any bugs but overall good game. I stopped after a while because the timer is too fast for each person.

Can you please add a “creative” or “endless” mod where the customers have no time limit and the game never ends. Literally just making burgers with peace. I always feel very rushed to make the burgers…

developer_response.body: In the beginning, Endless mode was included as one of the intended features. However, it proved too challenging to implement, so we ultimately decided to discard it. Since the game forms part of a study, we are unable to make further changes, but we assure you that our next game will be even better! Thank you for your review, and have a great day!

reviews.review_description: i don't really like this game but it's pretty fun i could see other people playing this but not me sorry
I think its really good, but the time limit really annoys me and i think it either should be removed, or make it longer.

I like the game. I really like cooking it also has a good role play aspect. 
I think it'd be amazing if there was an untimed version where you could just cook for the robots and not have to stress
It's so fun I love this its like real life but I need help getting out of the game but it's re ally good I recommend this for people who like cooking
I wish the fingers were more articulated, I think it would be cool to give the robots a thumbs up, and maybe add a spatula, I think a spatula would be cool and helpful!
the graphics are pretty good. And for some reason your hands disappear when you press your grip
great game!
this game is cool and i like it but it would be cool if there was like an sandbox mode. but in my opinion kinda underrated

developer_response.body: In the beginning, Endless mode was included as one of the intended features. However, it proved too challenging to implement, so we ultimately decided to discard it. Since the game forms part of a study, we are unable to make further changes, but we assure you that our next game will be even better! Thank you for your review, and have a great day!

reviews.review_description: It's creeping me out. Why does it have surveys? It's asking weird questions.

developer_response.body: "Because, as the description of the game says: 'JACG is also part of a PhD research project focused on understanding what factors enhance immersion and presence in VR games.' The surveys are just part of the study that make JACG free to play! Have a nice day!"

reviews.review_description:
Such a fire game. The virtual space is a good size so you can actually move around and get that full roomscale feel. It’s fast paced, but that’s the fun part of cooking games anyway. The surveys are surprisingly cool too—doing them in VR and pressing buttons just makes it more fun for some reason lol. The only problem I noticed while playing, was that you can walk through everything and I was not able to play more than twice but overall still a wonderful game! Wishing you the best with this project.

-Chevy

developer_response.body: At first, I was a little scared of the first comment! I thought it was going to be something like, “Such a fire game... burn it with fire!” 😅 But now, I just want to say that all of Just Another Cooking Game Devs love you, Chevy! ❤️ The project was a success and it's still going strong thanks to players like you. Even though this game won’t be receiving any more updates, it’s always amazing to see people still enjoying it and having fun. Thanks so much for the review, and have an awesome day!

reviews.review_description: This looks really cool and play is fun but the robots leave too fat to be enjoyable.

I’ve never had a more drastic descent into madness than when I played this game. So much so that I documented, edited, and posted my experience for all to see. 
That being said, absolutely I would do it again.

developer_response.body: In that case, I'll reply on both platforms! First of all, we don’t have any insurance, so you might just have to stay broken! If you’d really do it all over again, you should probably seek medical attention! (Just kidding.) Wishing you all the best, and thank you for the review!

reviews.review_title: MAKE IT WHERE MULTIPLE PEOPLE CAN PLAY!!
reviews.review_description: Hello I love this game it's so fun but I want to enjoy this game with my friends and you should make a mode when it says join a private code and you or your friends make a code and you help each other pls make this a mode

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! Multiplayer games are only made to humiliate others online, not to have fun =D (Joking!) Unfortunately, the game (... a PhD research) cannot be changed! Give a try to Cook-Out on meta store, it has everything you asked for! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description:
well the game is good but the game like broke down for me and I nearly had to do a full reset witch does mean all of your progress will be gone 
￼

developer_response.body: Hi Short, I'm Developer! Before the robot revolution, the game was much easier. Now that we no longer control the robots, it is tough for everyone these days. Thank you for your review, and good luck with the last levels!

reviews.review_description: It makes adrenaline rush through your body and make you feel like the robots have the attention spam worse then a goldfish

developer_response.body: To be honest, our users also seem to have the attention span of a goldfish, as the average player doesn’t play for more than 10 minutes. Maybe it’s just a little too much adrenaline! Thanks for the review and have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: why are they making us do a survey? ￼

developer_response.body: Because, as the description of the game says: 'JACG is also part of a PhD research project focused on understanding what factors enhance immersion and presence in VR games.' The surveys are just part of the study that make JACG free to play! Have a nice day!

developer_response.body: This issue may be related to your Guardian setup. Please try resetting your Guardian area and then try again. Good luck!

reviews.review_description: Please stop with the surveys. I cant play the game because of the surveys
Thought it was horror because of the questions in the beginning but still fun
But please add multiplayer
I got scared cause of an alarm but very good game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! Higher levels will feature more alarms... Keep going until level 12! Have a great day!

reviews.review_description: The mechanics in the game are really easy to learn, and the game is really good. But maybe make the customers more patient instead of them gone because they're too impatient. Still really good game

developer_response.body: I told everything you just said to my robots... and the only thing I got back was... "Ain't Nobody Got Time For That!" ... and something about how they are going to destroying mankind. Thank you so much for your kind review! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: The robots onto shut up and there is no good tutorial

Easy to understand. My pre-teen and I both enjoy playing it. The only issue is after the first time of playing when we launch it generates as if we're both 8ft tall so we have to sit on the floor to reach anything.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We're glad you and your kids enjoyed playing the game! The issue you mentioned happens when the floor/guardian is not setup correctly and its not really related to the game itself (as far as we know) .... or the game is morphing into a "How tall can you be simulator"... no one really know! Have fun!

reviews.review_title: Great game! Ignore the dumb reviews!
reviews.review_description:
Honestly amazing game, the virtual space is a decent size so you could get a good roomscale experience, actually walking irl. The game does get fast paced, but I mean that's literally the appeal of cooking games. Reminds me of those old cooking games on mobile!

Well thought out surveys too, love doing them in VR cos I get to press buttons! HAHAHA, atb with your project mate!

developer_response.body: Its for people like you that we've made this game! To be honest most negative reviews are from salty kids who can't handle the game pace, most of the others are just feature request. Our inspirations were overcooked and cookout but I also played those mobile games as well, so there is probably a little of that too! The fact that you know this is a project means that you've read 95% more than all others! Thank you for all the kind words and those sweet 5 stars! Have a nice day =)

reviews.review_title: Best game ever made in the world
reviews.review_description: I love the idea of cooking for bots and it reminds me of bot simulator and I love how it makes sense for the bots to be able to make their own decisions I guess I just love the idea

developer_response.body: And that’s exactly why we love you! You're probably the best human ever made in the world!—seriously, and no, we’re not your mom. 😄 We can see you're clearly getting ready for the age of Skynet and AI overlords—smart move starting early with robot flattery. Fingers crossed you live long enough to grill up some burgers for our future machine overlords (you've got the experience, after all!). Thanks a ton for the epic review!

reviews.review_description: I had just got my VR not too long ago and these were one of the games my friends were requesting i enjoyed the game it’s really fun the graphics are amazing especially with the little jokes i was laughing while cooking 😂 if you haven’t played it PLAY IT!!

developer_response.body: There is too much information to unpack! Let’s start ... First of all, thank you for those amazing 5 stars and this nice review! Now let’s address the elephant in the room ...your friends requested this game 🙄? I would renew those friends if I could, worst case scenario just keep them a few meters away from you (play it safe 🙏). Are the graphics amazing? 😊🤭 Of course they are ... I've made them 😏! Now is where things get really strange ... no one ... and I repeat... no one likes robot jokes! You should check your sense of humor as soon as possible; it may be something wrong with it! And to end things in perfection you share the most beautiful advise you could give ... "if you haven’t played it PLAY IT!!" , from my good friend... Datstarsunny.

reviews.review_title: Not bad but not enough time
reviews.review_description: Maybe this is just me, but the customers ALWAYS walk away as soon  as i’m finished with their meal. can’t get passed level 4 😔

It’s good but multiplayer would be amazing and if you could battle them in a cook off would be great and for some reason the food does not snap to each other and that sucks but everything else and yelling at everybody is great

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! Multiplayer games are only made to humiliate others online, not to have fun =D (Joking!) Unfortunately, the game (... a PhD research) cannot be changed and implementing a multyplayer is not that easy! Give a try to Cook-Out on meta store, it has everything you asked for! Have a nice day!

developer_response.body: Because, as the description of the game says: 'JACG is also part of a PhD research project focused on understanding what factors enhance immersion and presence in VR games.' The surveys are just part of the study that make JACG free to play! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: When i'm playing, its super good, fast paced, and just a good game, but when more aged people try to play, its just too fast, maybe do a mode where you can slow down the customers from being mad that fast. Good game, will recomend to my friends.

developer_response.body: Everything was good until we saw that "but"! In the beginning, Endless mode was included as one of the intended features. However, it proved too challenging to implement, so we ultimately decided to discard it. Since the game forms part of a study, we are unable to make further changes, but we assure you that our next game will be even better! Thank you for your review, and have a great day!

reviews.review_description: The game is pretty good and fun but you need more time and need multi-player i think the game would get to be better.

developer_response.body: Ill take the "pretty good and fun"! And if I ever have friends I will make it multi-player! Thank you so much for those sweet 5 stars ... and now ... I can go back to play Solitaire! #4everAlone

reviews.review_description: It just doesn’t do what a good cooking game does.

developer_response.body:
My grandma always told me, 'If it seems nice on paper... you probably should print it!"!
 We're still a bit confused about what exactly other cooking games let you do (besides cooking). Anyways, we hope you have better experiences in the future, and thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description: Y tried evrey way to start the game didn't let me.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry! This game is like a private party... not everyone is invited! Uninstall and try again cause this private party usually lets everyone in! xD

reviews.review_description: Can you add more updates this game is fun

developer_response.body: In the beginning, Endless mode was included as one of the intended features. However, it proved too challenging to implement, so we ultimately decided to discard it. Since the game forms part of a study, we are unable to make further changes, but we assure you that our next game will be even better! Thank you for your review, and have a great day!

reviews.review_description: Was this game AI generated? Feels like it was. Not bad by any means but felt like it was lacking personality.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Sometimes I wonder if my mom is AI... cause I also lack personality. But to answer your question... yes and no! We used AI to upscale some of the textures and ChatGPT to make annoying robot voice lines. Other than that, ... it was all little to no personality human labor! If at any point AI starts taking human jobs ... we should be the first unemployed humans. We wish you better luck!

reviews.review_description: Great game, if you are looking for "McDonald's simulator" this is the place. The size of the area is great. The only issue is that after finishing the level the whole map moves and I need to set up (rotate) and move the map again. Else great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your Review! It is highly inspired by McDonald's machines/workflow. We did try to save the "new position" but at the time there was a problem with the locomotion system that we could not solve. The workaround is trying to get it as close as possible to final, so you don’t need to adjust the area. (Annoying for sure.... I know) Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: Best game ever

developer_response.body: That’s my man Ejg2015! Who would settle for five stars when you can just give six? If I could, I would send you back, seven stars! Thanks for the review and have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: I've been playing i love this game best game ever

developer_response.body: No, Tommy, you are the best reviewer ever. You keep it simple and sweet, and that is a great combination. Thanks for the review and have a nice day!
